ASTRAL_MOVE_STAND.title: Astral Move - Stand
ASTRAL_MOVE_STAND.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
[gold]Star Point[/gold]: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.

ASTRAL_MOVE_TIGER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage three times.
[gold]Star Point[/gold]: Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
